MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference this day.
This cause came on as re-assigned by the PJ. for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Daniel R. Stern, Esq. for Plaintiff: Affordable Property Management LLC. Plaintiff's witness: Leon Pham.
Paul Behrend, Esq. for Defendants: Patrick Herlihy and Joseph Herlihy.
No appearance by Defendant: Robert Desmond. Court dismissed Robert Desmond without prejudice.
Parties reached a settlement by Stipulation.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Defendant will pay to Plaintiff's attorney all back rent of $4284.00 in a form of a cashier check or money order by the end of today.
Defendants will pay to the landlord in a form of a cashier check or money order of $300.00 for each of the following dates: 4/24/06, 5/1/06, 6/1/06, 7/1/06, 8/1/06, and $195.00 on 9/1/06.
Defendants will continue to pay rent not after the 5th of every month.
Defendants are subject to terms of future judgment.
Defendant will notify the plaintiff of inhabitable issues.
Plaintiff agreed to maintain and repair the premises in compliance to San Francisco codes.
Landlord agreed to notify defendants in 48 hours of receipt of complaints by posting notice on door and sending to counsel.
If 3 complaints occur, evidential hearing to determine defendants nuisance and judgment shall be entered.
Defendants occupy the unit. If any replacements occur, approval by the landlord is required.
Premises will be occupied by no more than 3 as defined on lease.
Defendants shall provide landlord a colored copy of premises report and 48 hours to bring premises to code.
If Defendants fail to comply, a 48 hour notice will be posted on the door and sent to their counsel to retain judgment. No stays for writ will be issued for any reason.
Parties agreed to terms of the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date was vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JONATHAN H. BORNSTEIN, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; MR. DUSTIN SERRANO, PROPERTY INSPECTOR, ALSO IS PRESENT ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY TED JANOWSKY, ESQ. APPEARS ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANTS JOSEPH HERLIHY AND PATRICK HERLIHY, WHO ALSO BOTH APPEAR THIS DAY.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE; TRIAL DATE OF MONDAY, APR-17-2006 REMAINS.

JUDGE PRO TEM IRVING PFEFFER; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (218/206).
